title: topology.json — units, ports, actuators, links
description: Hydraulic topology. Shape only. plant_validator.gd additionally enforces: unique IDs, dangling port/actuator references, DAG (cycle-free) topology, spill_destination_id resolving to an ExternalBoundary, and geometry consistency (maximum_volume_m3 vs spill_level_m * surface_area_m2).

$schema.description: Editor hint; ignored by the engine.

units.description: All process units (StorageUnit, ExternalBoundary) in the plant.

actuators.description: All valves; referenced from links by actuator_id.

links.description: Directed flow connections between unit ports; must form a DAG.

port_type.description: INLET receives flow. OUTLET withdraws only above min_operating_level_m (low-low cutoff). DRAIN withdraws down to zero volume.

in_service.description: Whether the unit is in-service (true) or out-of-service (false). Enforced in Phase 3.

surface_area_m2.description: Footprint [m2] used to derive level_m = volume_m3 / surface_area_m2. StorageUnit only.

bottom_elevation_m.description: Bottom elevation [m] relative to the plant datum. StorageUnit only.

floor_elevation_m.description: Floor elevation [m] relative to the plant datum. StorageUnit only.

high_level_m.description: Level [m above bottom] for high-level alarming. StorageUnit only.

spill_level_m.description: Level [m above bottom] where passive spill begins; must be >= high_level_m (cross-checked at runtime). StorageUnit only.

min_operating_level_m.description: Low-low cutoff [m above bottom]; OUTLET ports cannot draw below it (DRAIN ports can). StorageUnit only.

spill_destination_id.description: unit_id of the ExternalBoundary receiving this unit's spill. Required for StorageUnit; no code default exists (Edge Rule 5).

boundary_type.description: Mutually exclusive mass-balance ledger category (INV-1). ExternalBoundary only.

flow_limit_m3s.description: Cap [m3/s] on the boundary's TOTAL flow across all its links; the solver prorates to fit. Negative or absent = unlimited. ExternalBoundary only.

reference_head_m.description: Reference water surface/supply head elevation [m] relative to the plant datum. ExternalBoundary only.

opening_rate_percent_per_s.description: Valve travel rate opening [%/s]; e.g. 5.0 means 0->100% takes 20 s.

max_flow_m3s.description: Hydraulic capacity [m3/s]. RESTRICTED mode requests max_flow_m3s * actuator opening.

flow_mode.description: RESTRICTED: flow = capacity x valve opening. COMMANDED: unimplemented — warns at runtime and behaves as RESTRICTED fully open. GRAVITY: flow is self-regulated based on head differences.

design_head_m.description: Design head [m] for gravity flow calculation.

actuator_id.description: Valve governing this link. Omit for passive links.
